allow: Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres pg_isready -U helionest -d helionest_dev)
Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres psql -U helionest -d helionest_dev -c "CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS postgis; CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS postgis_topology;")
Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres psql -U postgres -d helionest_dev -c "\\du")
Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres psql -U helionest -d helionest_dev -c "SELECT current_user, current_database\(\);")
Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres sh -c "psql -U helionest -d helionest_dev -c ""SELECT usename, passwd IS NOT NULL as has_password FROM pg_shadow WHERE usename=''helionest'';""")
Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres sh -c "psql -U helionest -d helionest_dev -c ""SELECT usename, passwd FROM pg_shadow WHERE usename=''helionest'';""")
Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres sh -c "psql -U helionest -d helionest_dev -c ""ALTER USER helionest WITH PASSWORD ''helionest'';""")
Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres sh -c "psql -U helionest -d helionest_dev -c ""SET password_encryption = ''md5''; ALTER USER helionest WITH PASSWORD ''helionest'';""")

Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres sh -c "sed -i ''s/host all all all scram-sha-256/host all all all md5/'' /var/lib/postgresql/data/pg_hba.conf && cat /var/lib/postgresql/data/pg_hba.conf | tail -5")
Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres sh -c "psql -U helionest -d helionest_dev -c ""SET password_encryption=''md5''; ALTER USER helionest PASSWORD ''helionest'';""")
Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres sh -c "psql -U helionest -d helionest_dev -c ""SELECT pg_reload_conf\(\);""")

Bash(docker exec helionest-postgres sh -c "sed -i ''s/host all all all md5/host all all all trust/'' /var/lib/postgresql/data/pg_hba.conf && psql -U helionest -d helionest_dev -c ""SELECT pg_reload_conf\(\);""")
